name: Suspicious MSHTA Process Pattern
description:
Detects suspicious `mshta.exe` process patterns, including:
  * Binary run from a non-default path.
  * Execution of HTML applications (HTA) masquerading as non-HTA files.
  * MSHTA.exe with suspicious parent processes

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'mshta.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the mshta.exe executable. Will be a non-standard path if triggered by process_path_condition.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute mshta.exe.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process that launched mshta.exe (e.g., cmd.exe, powershell.exe).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which mshta.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
